titulo: AI-powered honeypots: Turning the tables on malicious AI agents
resumo: Just as AI brings time-saving advantages to our lives, it brings similar advantages to threat actors. We can take the advantage back. This blog shows how generative AI can be used to rapidly deploy adaptive honeypot systems.
